name: Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE - Fundo De Inversion Larrainvial Deuda Latam
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE - Fundo De Inversion Larrainvial Deuda Latam invests in Latin American debt. It is managed by Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE. The fund's objective is to generate income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of debt securities from Latin American countries.
